name: sycophancy-smoke-test
one_liner: CLI and library that scores chat transcripts for over-agreement, missing pushback, and confidence-without-evidence patterns.
deliverables: heuristic scoring engine for affirmation bias and weak disagreement
CLI report with per-turn flags and summary scores
fixture set of good and bad sample conversations
reasoning: HN and recent research are full of concern about sycophantic AI, but there is room for a lightweight local evaluator that teams can run on transcripts without any model API.
